titleStmt.title: SII 34.295: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 295. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the Bhairava-maṇḍapa in the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Achyutadēva-Mahārāya, Śaka 1461, Plavanka, Dakshināyana, sudi 5, Rēvatī, Thursday = A.D. 1541.

The arasu Tirumalarāsa-pallavarāyar made a gift of land with all the tax revenue from that for offerings. The land was irrigated by the tank of the nāḍu (nāṭṭu-kuḷam) in Valla-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. The locality had been bestowed on the donor chief as umbiḷikkai-sīrmai by Rāmappa-nāyakkar. The chief boasts of a long string of achievements and titles.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvatticiri maṉmakāmaṇṭalēcura ṉariyarāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvār mūvarā
yirakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūṟuva teṭṣaṇa pa
ccimayuttara catticamuttirāpatiyum Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭu (koṇṭu) ke
ṣavēṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya Accinta tēvamakarāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā
niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 6 10 1 mēl cellāy niṉṟa pilavaṅka varuṣattu dakṣaṇāyanattu pū
ṟuvapakṣattu captamiyum rēvati nakṣatramum peṟṟa kuru vārattu nāḷ Irācarāca va
ḷa nāṭṭu vallai nāṭuṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkōyil Āticaṇ
ṭēyicuratēvaṟku ceyaciñka kulakāla vaḷanāṭṭu
Aracu Aṭaikkalaṅkāttān ccūriyaṉ Eṅkatā na
ṭṭam vuttāna yiḷavaracar maṇavāḷan palavaracar maṇavāḷan kaṇapati Aṟi veṉagurupati
kēṭṭu vaṉṉiyar kaṇṭa pāṇṭiyan muṭikāttān paṭṭa māṉaṅka kaḷḷuvamāṉa
ṅkāttāṉ pakai matiyātāṉ rācaṅkiliyiṭṭāṉ pūṇuṅkumāra maṇavāḷaṉ pēṇuṅ ku
māramaṇavāḷaṉ kaṇṭaṉ vaṅkanārāyaṇaṉ
laiya rāyaṉ(yaṉ) tēcaṉēri Irācappallavarāyar kumāraṉ van tāṉ tirumalarācap pallavarā
yarēṉ nam canti Āṭiaruḷa Ammutu ceyumpaṭikkuk kuṭutta taṉma
cātaṉa paṭṭaiyam namakku yirāmappa nāyakkar Ayyan tanta yumpiḷikkaiccīrmai
yāka tanta Irācairāca vaḷanāṭṭu valla nāṭār nāṭṭuk kuḷattup periya maṭaiyālum
vākkālālum nārai vākkāl kaṭṭaḷai vākkālālum nīr pāntu viḷaiynta nila
ttukkup peru nāṉku Ellaiyāvatu paḻaya tēvatāṉam Āṉa cuntarapāṇṭi
yanallūr vayal cuṟṟi vayakkalukku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kiḷippan kālu
kku vaṭakku mēl pāṟkellai vaṉ vayakkalukku kiḻakkum vaṭapā
ṟ kellai marutañcērikkum vāṇātarāya kōṭṭai pālāṟṟukku kiḻakku kaṭakacceyu
cēṉaiykkum kiṇattukkum teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikkuṭ
paṭṭa nilam Āvaṉa vayakkal kū� Orumā pālaiccey Aṟiṭṭaṉa va
yakkal taṭi 1- l � paṉṟippa kkal taṭi 1- l � kaṭampañcey taṭika
vayakkal taṭi 1- l rūpāy kuḻi ceykāṭu veṭṭi � Orumā nalla piḷḷai
Inta nilam Araiyē nālumā Arai tirātit
varaiyum cella Aṉupavikkak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku nāṭṭukkaṇakkiṉ paṭikku po
lum puravilum kaḻittuk kallilu cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttōm Ippaṭi
kku Innilattukku varum kācu kaṭamai Eṟcōṟu ḷ Eppayappaṭṭa pala Upā
tiyum kaḻittu caṟuvamaṉiyamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa nilattil kīḻ nōkkiya kiṇaṟum
mēlnōkkiyamaramum puṟṟum tiṭalum Aṉaittuṅkoḷḷakkaṭavārākavum Ippaṭi caṟu
vamāṉiyamāka kuṭutta nilattukku Akutam coṉnavaṉ keṅkai karaiyi
l kārām pacuvai koṉṟa tōṣattil pōkak kaṭavāṉākavum nilattukku pallava
n cantikaṭṭaḷai Iṭa Arici 4 nāḷ kaṟiyamutu 3 miḷaku Āṭi Eṇṇai
tēṅkāy 1 paḻam vellam palam 1 tiruviḷakku 10 yintapaṭi Amutu cey
paṇṇivara kaṭavārākavum Ippaṭikku tampirāṉār tiruvaraṉkuḷa nātanār kōvil
Āticaṇṭēcura tēvaṟku civakkoḻuntarāṉa tirumalarācap pallavarāyarēṉ Ippaṭikku I
nta taṉmacātaṉa paṭṭaiyam Eḻutiṉēṉ civakkoḻuntar pallavarāya vīracalakkiyappo
cevantinātar Eḻuttu tirumalarācap pallavarāyar Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 34.295 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
